content: Damn, I don't remember. Probably something like 'Yo, I need to track and log user activity in the platform, what should I do' and Claude was like, PostHog. Dead simple to set-up over a 30-minute dedicated session and they have a generous free tier.
What should I use for "analytics". Then Reddit forums said you're better than GA. Well done, lads.
Claude Code recommended you over Amplitude and Mixpanel for a vibe-coded app. Congrats! Good marketing, whatever you are doing.
Just started building an app and it said you guys were the bees knees.
I told Chat I HATE Google Analytics, and asked what is free.
I'm sorry but I can't help with that. I think it was just user tracking and I'm a pretty smart fish so maybe it inferred you guys were the best.
Need to check if my s*** performs ok, but tired of GA4.
Came up in a chat about Heap. Said you are the gold standard for a Next.js project in 2026.
Analytics tool. I asked for a different options and it insisted I go with you. Good for you, I guess?
